title: alyssum lapeyrouseanum subsp. angustifolium
intro: Alyssum lapeyrouseanum subsp. angustifolium, also known as a subspecies of the more commonly recognized Alyssum lapeyrouseanum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to be beneficial in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a good night's sleep, possibly due to its calming effects. In herbal preparations, Alyssum lapeyrouseanum subsp. angustifolium is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
